description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low wooden fence and lush landscaping, including palm trees and flowering shrubs. The building features a flat roof with a small raised section, and a mix of white and wood-paneled exterior walls. Large windows and sliding glass doors are visible, especially on the side and rear, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the garden. The front yard is landscaped with a pathway leading to the main entrance, and the backyard includes a partially covered patio area. The property is bordered by a sidewalk and a paved road, typical of suburban or urban neighborhoods. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, and lush landscaping within a fenced yard. Large windows and a covered patio highlight its open, contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and a clear view of the flat roof and fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, palm trees, and the transition from the street to the fenced property.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, large windows, and dense garden area within the fenced backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more visible trees and shrubs, and a clear look at the flat roof and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped side and rear windows
